targetAircraftOrObject: McDonnell Douglas DC-9-50/DC-9-51 family cockpit flight controls
targetVariantStatus: Target production cockpit remains DC-9-50; current visual reference pack includes DC-9-51 material, so preserve sourceVariant, targetVariant, and variantScope on every downstream candidate.
sourceIdentity: art-source/marble/aircraft-cockpit-flight-controls/source/high-quality-mesh.glb, treated as an owner-provided Marble candidate for flight-control source intake.
allowedUsage: Agent 1 source intake, hash recording, and metadata inspection
proxy blockout and scale-composition comparison after Blender import
candidate comparison against approved DC-9 reference photos and modeling briefs
pivot, hierarchy, material-count, and texture inspection before any assembly consideration
forbiddenUsage: direct runtime use before Blender cleanup, validation, and reporting
mixing Airbus A320 or unrelated modern cockpit details into the DC-9 scene group
promotion to public/models or browser integration without downstream approval
variantCompatibility: Unresolved proxy candidate. Do not treat the Marble mesh as DC-9-50 or DC-9-51 exact geometry unless Agent 1 records component-level evidence against the approved reference pack.
